name: 60'' Console Table with Braided Legs  - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Refresh the look of your entryway with this 60-Inch Console Table Braided Legs from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular table is designed in a refined walnut brown shade with a smooth tabletop and a bottom shelf, providing plenty of room for storage and display. Four braided legs complete the design with a decorative touch.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 59.06 inches
Overall Height: 29.5 inches
Overall Depth: 15.7 inches
Diameter of braided legs: 3.5 inches
Distance between top frame and shelf frame: 20.6 inches
Distance from the floor to bottom of shelf tray: 3.3 inches
Depth of Shelf: 10.6 inches
Width of Shelf: 50.4 inches
